items.title: How did a wolf become a fugitive in South Korea?
items.dek: A wolf burrowed under a fence at his zoo in South Korea becoming the country's newest fugitive.
items.body: A wolf burrowed under a fence at his zoo in South Korea becoming the country's newest fugitive.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ex-Virginia deputy governor kills wife and himself in murder-suicide, police say
items.dek: Investigators say Justin Fairfax shot his wife, Cerina, multiple times before turning the gun on himself.
items.body: Investigators say Justin Fairfax shot his wife, Cerina, multiple times before turning the gun on himself.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine
items.dek: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.
items.body: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.
items.author: IriLine Desk
